title: Better GUI For Sophisticated Backpacks
description: Let the interface, buttons, and inventory slots of the Sophisticated Backpacks showcase the visual experience of CozyUI+.
body:
![DiamondBackpack Connect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b183fedc54b298195dcff94489d099db20a58928.jpeg)

_The texture pack offers two cosmetic options: Standard and Connected._

Material beautification source reference: CozyUI+. Please use with the corresponding material pack.

Version: neoforge 1.21.x，For other versions, please test independently and inform me of results.

This material pack adheres to the GPL-3.0 License. Contact me for source files if needed.

Mod：**[sophisticated-backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks)**

Recommended for use Resource PacksI：**[CozyUI+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cozyui-plus)**
